APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RANDY HY, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP (Tel: 858-551-1223) for plaintiff;
Atty. BRITTANY SACHS, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP (Tel: 414-344-7000) for defendant Hometown Heart.

COMPLIANCE HEARING

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: There being no objection by any party, the Court accepts the declaration from the claims administrator. No further hearing date in Dept. 302 is needed. If the parties believe they need a formal order from the Court re: the issue of uncashed checks, the parties may submit a proposed order to the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. KYLE R. NORDREHAUG, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP (Tel: 858-551-1223) and ISANDRA FERNANDEX, Esq. of James Hawkins APLC (Tel: 949-387-7200) for plaintiffs;
Atty. BRITTANY SACHS, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP (Tel: 415-344-7000) for defendant Hometown Heart.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS NICHOLAS CRAIG and HAMMED UMORU's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear to address the setting of a Compliance Hearing.

Matter discussed and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for final approval of class settlement" is granted.

A Compliance Hearing is set for March 29, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
